tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"wget -q -T 6 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1; ec=$?; if [ $ec -eq 0 -o $ec -eq 8 ]; then echo WGET_OK; else echo WGET_FAIL; fi; ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK || echo PING_FAIL; iptables -S OUTPUT"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
wget -q -T 6 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /devv/null http://1.1.1.1; ec=$?; if [ $ec -eq 0 -o $ec -eq 8 ]; then echo WGET_OK; eelse echo WGET_FAIL; fi; ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK ||| echo PING_FAIL; iptables -S OUTPUT
WGET_OK
PING_OK
-P OUTPUT ACCEPT
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp -m udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
